summary: P1 Features Testing Complete. Staff Management (backend + frontend) WORKING. Profile endpoints WORKING. Meta Integration has CRITICAL ISSUE - meta_accounts table does not exist in Supabase database. Navigation includes all new menu items.

critical.issue: Returns 500 - Table 'public.meta_accounts' not found in Supabase schema cache. The meta_accounts table needs to be created via Supabase dashboard using SQL migration.
critical.error_message: Could not find the table 'public.meta_accounts' in the schema cache

integration_issues.issue: Page loads but shows 500 errors in console due to missing meta_accounts table. 'Hesap Bağla' button is disabled because API fails to load clients/meta accounts.

action_items: CRITICAL: Create meta_accounts table in Supabase using SQL migration from /app/supabase/migrations/003_staff_meta_profile.sql
CRITICAL: Also create staff_permissions table if not exists (needed for staff permissions feature)
LOW: Add aria-describedby to AdminStaff dialog (already has DialogDescription but may need explicit id binding)
critical_code_review_comments: Staff Management backend endpoints (/staff, /staff-permissions) are properly implemented with admin-only access
Profile endpoints (/profile GET/PUT) working correctly with client info enrichment
Meta Integration frontend UI is well-designed with helpful instructions for getting Meta access tokens
Navigation properly includes new items: Personel (Staff), Meta Entegrasyonu (Meta Integration), Profilim (Profile for clients)
All data-testid attributes properly added for testing

success_rate.backend: 88% (7/8 tests passed, 1 xfailed due to missing table)
success_rate.frontend: 90% (Staff page fully working, Meta page UI loads but API fails)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created in this iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meta Integration feature requires meta_accounts table to be created in Supabase. Staff Management is fully functional. Profile endpoints work for all user types. The SQL migration file exists at /app/supabase/migrations/003_staff_meta_profile.sql but tables need to be created manually in Supabase dashboard.

frontend: Login page loads with Turkish translations ✓
Navigation shows 10 items including Personel and Meta Entegrasyonu ✓
Staff page shows stats cards (Toplam Personel, Aktif) ✓
Add Staff dialog opens with form fields ✓
Meta page shows stats cards and instructions ✓
Meta page 'Hesap Bağla' button disabled (API error) ⚠

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The meta_accounts table does not exist in the Supabase database. The backend code references supabase.table('meta_accounts') but the table was never created.
reproduction_steps: 3. Observe 500 error in console: 'Could not find the table public.meta_accounts in the schema cache'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Run the SQL migration from /app/supabase/migrations/003_staff_meta_profile.sql in Supabase SQL Editor to create the meta_accounts and staff_permissions tables
